name: Feedback - No (Wrong Solution Type/Technology)
contextNote: Bot showed fiber-based internet recommendations (Fiber Broadband PEAK 200, SUMMIT 500, IX Express) for a user in a remote area. User says 'not really' - likely because fiber isn't available in their location.
reasoning: Context: User said 'not really' to fiber recommendations for remote area
Likely issue: Fiber infrastructure not available in remote location
User context: 'remote area' strongly suggests need for satellite/wireless solutions
Solution: Switch from fiber to satellite while staying in Internet solution category
Strategy: Recommend Starlink + wireless backup options
CRITICAL: Do NOT ask for industry/size/use case - already have context
CRITICAL: Acknowledge likely infrastructure challenge (fiber availability)
CRITICAL: Show DIFFERENT technology (satellite) not just different fiber tiers
Ask: ONE question about location specifics or backup connectivity needs
Show empathy: Recognize remote area connectivity challenges

recommendedItems.name: Satellite Internet (Starlink)
recommendedItems.reason: Perfect for remote areas without fiber infrastructure. High-speed connectivity (50-200 mbps) via satellite. Quick deployment, no ground infrastructure needed.

recommendedItems.name: Fiber Broadband PEAK 200-400 mbps
recommendedItems.reason: Consider as backup option if fiber becomes available in your area. Some remote areas have expanding fiber coverage.

recommendedItems.name: 4G/5G Wireless Backup
recommendedItems.reason: Redundancy option to pair with Starlink. Ensures connectivity even if satellite connection is affected by weather.

output.reply:
I understand - fiber infrastructure might not be available in your remote area. Here are better alternatives:

**Satellite Internet (Starlink)**: Perfect solution for remote locations. High-speed connectivity (50-200 mbps) with no ground infrastructure needed. Quick deployment.
**4G/5G Wireless Backup**: Consider this as redundancy paired with Starlink for weather-related outages.

Is fiber infrastructure unavailable in your area, or are you looking for a faster deployment option?

metadata.notes: Critical example: Shows how to pivot from wrong technology (fiber) to appropriate solution (satellite) based on user context (remote area) without restarting discovery. Demonstrates contextual inference.
